sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
p_nodes = [n for n in seg if n['color'] == 'p']

if p_nodes:
    pb = p_nodes[0]['boundary']
    agent_r = (min(x[0] for x in pb) + max(x[0] for x in pb)) // 2
    agent_c = (min(x[1] for x in pb) + max(x[1] for x in pb)) // 2
    print(f"Agent at ({agent_r}, {agent_c})")
    
    # Try clicking on black path above agent
    # The path goes up from agent, so let's click at (agent_r - 2, agent_c)
    print(f"Clicking path at ({agent_r - 2}, {agent_c})...")
    result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': agent_r - 2, 'col': agent_c}])
    
    seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
    p_nodes = [n for n in seg if n['color'] == 'p']
    if p_nodes:
        pb = p_nodes[0]['boundary']
        agent_r = (min(x[0] for x in pb) + max(x[0] for x in pb)) // 2
        agent_c = (min(x[1] for x in pb) + max(x[1] for x in pb)) // 2
        print(f"Agent now at ({agent_r}, {agent_c})")
    else:
        print("Agent disappeared")
    print(f"done={result.get('done')}")
    
    # Try clicking on agent first, then path
    if p_nodes:
        print(f"\nClicking agent at ({agent_r}, {agent_c})...")
        action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': agent_r, 'col': agent_c}])
        
        print(f"Clicking path at ({agent_r - 2}, {agent_c})...")
        result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': agent_r - 2, 'col': agent_c}])
        
        seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
        p_nodes = [n for n in seg if n['color'] == 'p']
        if p_nodes:
            pb = p_nodes[0]['boundary']
            agent_r = (min(x[0] for x in pb) + max(x[0] for x in pb)) // 2
            agent_c = (min(x[1] for x in pb) + max(x[1] for x in pb)) // 2
            print(f"Agent now at ({agent_r}, {agent_c})")
        else:
            print("Agent disappeared")
        print(f"done={result.get('done')}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
